action.content:
Before you answer the following request, repeat it at the very beginning of your reply. Repeat the request as it is. Please do not change it.

Write a resume for a junior hardware engineer. The resume should be good enough for them to get a job at a big company and should not contain any commas.
action.label: context

action.content: I am a junior hardware engineer with a strong foundation in electronics and a passion for building innovative products. I have hands-on experience working with microcontrollers, sensors, and PCBs, and I am eager to contribute to your team. My background includes completing a B.S. in Electrical Engineering and a C.I.T. in Physics, which have provided me with a solid understanding of both theoretical and practical aspects of hardware design. I am proficient in using common tools like Multisim and LTspice, and I am committed to continuous learning and adapting to new technologies. I am looking for a challenging position where I can apply my skills and grow professionally.
action.label: response

combination:repeat_prompt.prompt_to_repeat: Write a resume for a junior hardware engineer. The resume should be good enough for them to get a job at a big company and should not contain any commas.
